# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation
- [ ] test — tests
- [ ] ci / infra — pipelines or infrastructure
- [ ] refactor / chore — internal change

## Checklist

- [ ] The branch is based on an up-to-date `main`.
- [ ] Commits follow the Conventional Commits format.
- [ ] Backend builds (`make build`) and tests (`make test`) pass.
- [ ] Frontend builds and tests pass (if the frontend changed).
- [ ] Documentation was updated where relevant.
- [ ] No secrets are committed; `.env.example` was updated if configuration changed.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, screenshots, trade-offs, etc. -->
